Neurological Medicine  ·  Monti Institute
Neurological Medicine Division  ·  Monti Institute of Neuro Aesthetics

Neurological &
Migraine Medicine

Precision Neurology. Protocol-Driven Care.

Physician-led diagnosis and management of migraine, headache disorders, and neurologic pain conditions using advanced clinical protocols and interventional therapies.

Clinical Focus

Conditions We Treat

Chronic Migraine
Episodic Migraine
Cluster Headache
Tension-Type Headache
Neuralgia & Facial Pain
Post-Traumatic Headache
Treatment Approach

A Structured Clinical Methodology

01
Comprehensive Neurological Evaluation Structured diagnostic assessment of headache phenotype, pain pattern, and neurologic history — forming the clinical foundation for all treatment decisions.
02
Individualized Protocol Design Each patient receives a treatment protocol built around their specific diagnosis, comorbidities, and clinical goals — never a templated regimen.
03
Preventive & Abortive Pharmacologic Therapies Evidence-based pharmacologic management including CGRP-pathway agents, preventive regimens, and acute abortive therapies calibrated to headache frequency and severity.
04
Interventional Treatments Targeted nerve blocks, trigger point injections, and botulinum toxin protocols — delivered under physician supervision as part of a structured care plan.
05
Long-Term Management & Optimization Ongoing longitudinal care with protocol adjustments based on treatment response — prioritizing sustained reduction in migraine burden and neurologic function.
Signature Treatments

Interventional & Therapeutic Protocols

01
Botox for Chronic Migraine
FDA-approved OnabotulinumtoxinA protocol administered across 31 standardized injection sites for chronic migraine prevention — physician-led, protocol-driven.
02
Occipital Nerve Blocks
Targeted anesthetic and steroid injection at the greater and lesser occipital nerves for migraine rescue, occipital neuralgia, and cervicogenic headache.
03
Trigger Point Injections
Precision injections targeting myofascial trigger points contributing to headache amplification and cervical pain — integrated into a broader migraine management plan.
04
CGRP-Based Therapies
Access to the full class of anti-CGRP monoclonal antibodies and gepant-class agents — selected and monitored as part of a structured preventive migraine protocol.
05
Neuromodulation Strategies
Non-pharmacologic and device-based neuromodulation approaches integrated with clinical pharmacotherapy for patients with refractory or complex migraine presentations.
06
Neurological Infusion Therapy
Physician-supervised IV protocols for migraine rescue, magnesium replenishment, and NAD+ neurological support — administered in a monitored clinical setting.
The Monti Method
Neurological Medicine
"A structured, physician-led approach integrating diagnostics, intervention, and longitudinal care to optimize neurologic function and reduce symptom burden — guided by evidence, executed with precision."
Begin Neurological Care

Schedule a Neurological Consultation

New patients are seen by appointment. All consultations begin with a comprehensive neurological evaluation before any treatment is recommended.

Our Team

The Clinicians Behind Your Care

Every neurological consultation at the Monti Institute is conducted by a clinician with advanced training, a structured clinical methodology, and a commitment to evidence-based, individualized care.

Add Photo
Founder & Medical Director

Ryan Monti, MD

Internal Medicine  ·  Board-Certified  ·  Hackensack University Medical Center

Dr. Ryan Monti is a board-certified physician specializing in migraine medicine and Internal Medicine. He earned his medical degree in 2013 and completed his residency at Hackensack University Medical Center in 2017. Dr. Monti has practiced across a wide range of clinical environments throughout the United States, including critical care settings during the COVID-19 pandemic. In addition to his clinical work, he has contributed to medical education as an Associate Professor of Medicine with the Medical College of Georgia. His clinical approach integrates evidence-based migraine management with structured, longitudinal protocol design — guided by diagnostic precision and conservative execution.

MD  ·  Board-Certified Migraine Medicine Internal Medicine Assoc. Prof. MCG Multi-State Licensed
Add Photo
Advanced Care Practitioner

Sean Kump, PA-C

Physician Assistant  ·  Emergency Medicine  ·  Arcadia University  ·  MedStar Franklin Square

Sean Kump is a highly experienced Advanced Care Practitioner with over a decade of clinical expertise in emergency medicine, bringing a precise, detail-oriented approach to patient care. He completed his training at Arcadia University and further advanced his skills through an emergency medicine fellowship at MedStar Franklin Square Medical Center in Baltimore. With specialized, up-to-date training in migraine medicine, Sean focuses on the RITE migraine protocol, utilizing advanced BOTOX regional injection techniques to deliver targeted, results-driven relief. His work is grounded in clinical excellence, safety, and a deeply personalized approach to care. Outside of the clinic, Sean enjoys backcountry skiing, camping, and spending time raising his Newfoundland puppy.

PA-C Emergency Medicine RITE Migraine Protocol BOTOX Injections MedStar Fellowship
Advanced Facial Therapeutics  ·  Monti Institute
Advanced Facial Therapeutics Division  ·  Monti Institute

Aesthetic
Medicine

Structural Precision. Natural Outcomes.

Advanced facial therapeutics delivered through physician-supervised protocols integrating injectables, energy-based devices, and regenerative treatments.

AFT
Advanced Facial Therapeutics
Treatment Categories

Aesthetic Medicine Systems

01
Neuromodulators
Botox and Dysport administered with anatomical precision — softening dynamic movement without sacrificing natural expression.
02
Dermal Fillers
Hyaluronic acid volumization guided by three-dimensional facial analysis — restoring structural proportion, not adding visible volume.
03
Laser & Energy-Based Devices
FDA-cleared, medical-grade laser and energy platforms — selected per skin type, condition, and treatment objective.
04
Skin Rejuvenation
Medical-grade skin health protocols including Hydrafacial, prescription skincare, and advanced resurfacing systems for long-term skin architecture.
05
Regenerative Aesthetics
Biostimulatory collagen therapies, microneedling, and regenerative protocols that rebuild dermal structure progressively over time.
06
Body Contouring
Non-invasive fascia remodeling, skin tightening, and contouring systems — addressing tissue architecture without surgical intervention.
Clinical Approach

Precision-Based Aesthetic Framework

01
Full-Face Assessment & Mapping Every consultation begins with a comprehensive evaluation of facial anatomy, skin condition, and aesthetic goals — before any treatment is discussed.
02
Structural & Anatomical Analysis Treatment planning is guided by neuro-anatomical knowledge and facial proportion analysis — ensuring placement is safe, precise, and structurally appropriate.
03
Conservative, Buildable Enhancements We begin conservatively. Results are built incrementally to ensure outcomes remain natural, balanced, and aligned with the patient's individual features.
04
Long-Term Aesthetic Planning Each treatment is considered within the context of long-term skin health and facial aging — not as an isolated procedure.
05
Safety-First, Medically Guided Care All protocols are delivered within a physician-supervised clinical framework. Patient safety and tissue integrity are non-negotiable at every step.
Signature Treatments

Refined Protocols for Natural Results

01
Full-Face Rebalancing
A comprehensive injectable protocol addressing multiple zones simultaneously — restoring facial harmony, proportion, and structural balance.
02
Lip Enhancement
Precise hyaluronic acid placement for natural lip structure, definition, and symmetry — never overcorrected, always proportionate.
03
Jawline & Chin Contouring
Lower face definition through strategic filler placement and neuromodulator protocols — sharpening contour without altering facial identity.
04
Skin Tightening & Resurfacing
Energy-based and fractional laser protocols for collagen stimulation, surface refinement, and non-surgical tissue lifting.
05
Collagen-Stimulating Therapies
Sculptra and biostimulatory agents that rebuild dermal architecture progressively — producing results that emerge naturally over months, not immediately.
06
Laser Pigment & Vascular Correction
Pico, IPL, and Nd:YAG systems for targeted correction of sun damage, melasma, vascular lesions, and acne discoloration.
The Monti Method
Aesthetic Medicine
"A precision-based aesthetic framework prioritizing balance, proportion, and natural refinement through medically guided, protocol-driven treatments — where restraint is the highest form of expertise."

The Clinicians Behind Your Care

Every treatment at the Monti Institute is delivered by a clinician with advanced training, a commitment to anatomical precision, and a philosophy rooted in restraint and natural outcomes.

Add Photo
Founder & Medical Director

Ryan Monti, MD

Internal Medicine  ·  Board-Certified  ·  Hackensack University Medical Center

Dr. Ryan Monti is a board-certified physician with subspecialty training in migraine medicine and medical aesthetics. He earned his medical degree in 2013 and completed his Internal Medicine residency at Hackensack University Medical Center in 2017.

Having practiced across the United States — including critical care settings during the COVID-19 pandemic — Dr. Monti brings a depth of clinical experience that grounds every aesthetic protocol in medical integrity. His aesthetic philosophy centers on anatomical precision, conservative execution, and outcomes that are natural, balanced, and enduring.

MD  ·  Board-Certified Migraine Medicine Medical Aesthetics Assoc. Prof. MCG

Aesthetic Clinician & Lead Injector

Morgan Melton, MSN, APRN, CPNP-PC

Pediatric Nurse Practitioner  ·  11+ Years Clinical Experience  ·  Nevada

Morgan Melton is a Nevada-born Pediatric Nurse Practitioner with over 11 years of medical experience and 4 years in advanced clinical practice. Her foundation in precision medicine and neurologically informed care informs every aesthetic decision she makes.

Morgan operates within the Advanced Facial Therapeutics division of the Monti Institute under physician supervision, training in advanced laser technologies, facial rejuvenation, and emerging modalities in skin health and body contouring. Her aesthetic philosophy centers on structural refinement over transformation — delivering results that are precise, harmonious, and enduring.

MSN, APRN, CPNP-PC Laser & Injectables Skin Rejuvenation Nevada Native
Aesthetic RN  ·  Migraine & Facial Therapeutics Specialist

Addison Jensen, RN

Registered Nurse  ·  8+ Years Critical Care  ·  Aesthetic Medicine

With over 8 years of experience in critical care nursing, Addison brings a foundation of precision, clinical excellence, and deeply patient-centered care into aesthetic and neurologic medicine. Her background has shaped a meticulous, safety-first approach while also refining her ability to truly listen and understand each patient’s unique goals.

She specializes in advanced migraine and facial therapeutics, where aesthetic medicine and neurologic precision intersect. Her approach is rooted in delivering natural, balanced results while addressing underlying concerns with intention and expertise.

Having personally experienced aesthetic treatments, Addison understands the level of trust they require. Every treatment is approached with discretion, honesty, and a commitment to refined, individualized care. Her philosophy: thoughtful, science-led treatments designed to help patients look, feel, and function at their highest level.

The Institute

A New Standard in Aesthetic & Neurologic Care

The Monti Institute integrates advanced migraine medicine and facial therapeutics within a precision-based clinical framework. Every treatment is guided by anatomical expertise, physician-supervised protocols, and a commitment to natural, balanced outcomes.

We do not approach treatments as isolated procedures, but as part of a long-term strategy focused on structure, function, and refinement.

Advanced Facial Therapeutics
Aesthetic Medicine
Precision injectables, energy-based devices, and regenerative treatments designed to restore balance, structure, and natural expression.
Migraine & Neurologic Medicine
Neurological Medicine
Comprehensive migraine care and neurologic treatment protocols addressing root causes with advanced, evidence-based approaches.
The Process

Your Experience

Every treatment begins with understanding — followed by precision, restraint, and long-term planning.

01
Consultation & Assessment
A comprehensive evaluation of facial anatomy, neurologic symptoms, and treatment goals. Every recommendation begins with a full understanding of structure, function, and patient priorities.
02
Precision Treatment Planning
Protocols are developed using anatomical mapping, clinical expertise, and a conservative approach — ensuring each treatment is intentional, safe, and aligned with natural outcomes.
03
Treatment Delivery
All treatments are performed within a physician-supervised clinical framework, integrating advanced technologies and techniques with a focus on comfort, precision, and safety.
04
Ongoing Refinement
Results are assessed over time, with adjustments made gradually to maintain balance, optimize outcomes, and support long-term skin and neurologic health.

Refined outcomes are built over time — never rushed, never overdone.

Curated Protocols

A curated selection of advanced protocols designed to restore balance, structure, and natural function.

Full-Face Rebalancing
A comprehensive injectable approach addressing multiple facial zones to restore harmony, proportion, and structural balance — never overcorrected, always intentional.
